description: Address constants for PCMD tone block: Common, Common2, per-partial (88 keys). Each partial: 4 WMT waves (wave group/number, gain, panorama, velocity range, random switch), TVF (type, cutoff, reso, env ADSR), TVA (level, pan, env ADSR), Pitch Env, Output (level, chorus/reverb send, output assign). ~30+ params per key × 4 WMT. Add PcmDrumKitState, PcmDrumPartialState structs.
title: Core: PCMD address map and state types
